hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams unify case management, audit evidence, regulatory rules, and reporting to efficiently respond to regulator inquiries with a clear operational workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance response slows with scattered evidence
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to gather and connect case history, alerts, and provider outputs when responding to regulator requests. This fragmentation creates delays in producing structured audit evidence and increases the risk of incomplete or inconsistent compliance responses.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links alerts, provider outputs, reviewer actions and decision logs into structured cases that streamline regulator responses with clear, audit-ready evidence and comprehensive compliance context.
workflow_title: From case creation to regulator reporting
workflow_description: SFTY organizes alerts, provider checks and case reviews into structured evidence packages that support regulator requests and compliance reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns fragmented compliance outputs into structured cases, decision history and evidence packages for clearer responses to regulator requests and audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured evidence, provider orchestration and audit-ready compliance records designed for controlled enterprise deployment and regulatory inspection readiness.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how to prepare regulator evidence packages
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows support regulator request response
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence preserves AML compliance history
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider outputs connect in regulatory inspection workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams a connected layer to connect provider outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions and reports for digital asset AML operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle regulator request responses?
faq_2_answer: SFTY organizes alerts, case histories and evidence packages into structured responses aligned to regulatory inspections, improving traceability and operational clarity during regulator requests.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case records, decision logs and linked evidence to support audit readiness and enables review of compliance activities over time.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools, integrating their outputs into one operational compliance workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY connects and structures outputs from existing providers without replacing them, enabling coordinated compliance review and reporting.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects AML case history, audit evidence and provider outputs to support clear regulator responses.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
